title: Whistleblowing disclosures made to the Charity Commission for England and Wales 2024 to 2025
body: "This report explains the Commission’s approach to whistleblowing and the reports that we received between 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.  We have published this in response to our duty as a prescribed person to report annually on the whistleblowing disclosures that have been made to us. This duty can be found in The Public Interest Disclosure (Prescribed Persons) Order 2014  The government will collate the reports from Prescribed Persons and lay them before Parliament. "
